caption: The video appears to be a podcast recording session titled "Boss Talk 101." The first frame shows a woman with braided hair styled in an updo, wearing headphones and speaking into a microphone. She is dressed in a black shirt and seems engaged in conversation. The background includes a screen displaying the name "Johnson" and a sign that reads "Employees Only." In the second frame, a man wearing a cap and headphones is seen adjusting his hat while speaking into a microphone. He is also dressed in a black shirt with text on it and is adorned with jewelry, including watches and a necklace. The backdrop features stars and the words "Unique Hustle," along with the podcast's branding. Both individuals appear to be actively participating in a discussion or interview, contributing to the podcast's content.
